raw_consumer_statement: I have experienced credit card fraud and identity theft on XX/XX/XXXX with Barclays Bank Delaware with a charge of {$360.00}. I dont even live in Delaware XXXX I live in Massachusetts XXXX I tried to dispute this recently with XXXX  and the bank itself but they reported it as VERIFIED AS ACCURATE AND UPDATED. I need to re-dispute the credit account along with supporting documents to aid the investigation.
